ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Probate Of Will And For Letters Testementary
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Kershner appeared by zoom for petitioner.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 27, 2009 is admitted to probate. Natalie Allen is appointed as the Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Probate Of Will And For Letters Testementary
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
